summary: Solid PowerShell work with good error handling and deterministic design, but workflow has issues: (1) `actions/checkout@v4` must be pinned to full SHA per requirements—currently a security violation; (2) Lines 45–55 and 58–68 duplicate param-building logic (should be factored into a helper or composite action); (3) 'Resolve inputs' step (lines 39–44) is informational only and doesn't contribute to the solution; (4) `today.txt` pattern is undocumented magic. The module logic is clean and testable, but the workflow could be more DRY and maintainable.
